items.title: Sources: The Orlando Magic will add Mfon Udofia as an assistant coach. He won the most games in Long Island Nets history as head coach and had 3 NBA call-ups this year. He was Nigeria’s head coach at the FIBA AfroBasket 2021 Qualifiers and an assistant at the 2019 FIBA World Cup.

items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Orlando Magic will add Mfon Udofia as an assistant coach. He won the most games in Long Island Nets history as head coach and had 3 NBA call-ups this year. items.title: "Guys are gonna pattern their game after me."
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
"Guys are gonna pattern their game after me."

Confidence is a superpower, and Meleek Thomas has it in spades.

I also love that even stretches w/o the ball, often stationed in the corner, don't take from his effort & commitment on defense. And when it comes his way again, Thomas is ready to score.

items.body_excerpt: The Orlando Magic will add Riley Crean as an assistant coach, league sources told HoopsHype.
